findings.title: id-token write without trust restriction
findings.message: Job "release" grants id-token: write without an environment or trusted branch restriction.
findings.remediation: Restrict OIDC use to trusted branches or protected environments and grant id-token only in the job that needs it.

findings.title: job-level permission escalation
findings.message: Job "release" grants write permissions beyond the workflow baseline.
findings.remediation: Keep the workflow baseline explicit and narrow; grant elevated scopes only to isolated trusted jobs.
